<size=48>――前線基地 娼館前の通り</size>: <size=48>—Frontline Base, street in front of the brothel</size>
人通りの多いその道に、<br>ぶつぶつと呟きながらその場を行ったり来たりする魔法:
On that busy street, a magician paced back and forth, muttering to
herself.
はぁぁ……ど、どどど、どうすれば……。 <br>やや、やっぱりここで働くしか……:
*sigh*... W-what should I do...? I-I guess I have no choice but to work
here after all...
ふわわっ！？ し、司令官くん！？ <br>えへへ……き、奇遇ですね……？: Whaa! C-Commander! Ehehe... w-what a coincidence...?
まあ、奇遇ではあるが……。<br>どうしたんだよ、この世の終わりみたいな顔をして:
Well, it's a coincidence, but... What's wrong? You looked like it was
the end of the world.
……やっぱり司令官くんには分かります？<br>実はその……騎士活にお金を使いすぎ:
So you can tell, Commander? Actually... I spent too much on knight
fandom...
騎士活……女性騎士を応援する推し活、だったか。<br>ま、趣味に金がかかるのは仕:
Knight fandom... That's the hobby of supporting female knights,
right? Well, it can't be helped that hobbies cost money.
そうなんですよ、そうなんですけどぉ…… <br>給料日はまだまだ先なのに、もう一:
That's right, that's true, but... Payday is still ages away, and I'm
almost broke...
こうなったら、ここで働こうかなって悩んでたんですよぉ。<br>従業員を募集してる:
At this point, I was thinking of working here. I heard they're
recruiting...
娼婦はいつだって歓迎ではあるが……。 <br>どうしてわざわざ娼館を選ぶ？ バイ:
Courtesans are always welcome, but... Why specifically choose the
brothel? There must be other part-time jobs, right?
だって娼館の女の子たちの可愛い衣装、最高じゃないですか！<br>私もあんなのを着:
But the cute outfits the brothel girls wear are the best! I thought it'd
be nice if I could wear one and work there too...
あー、確かにな。 <br>娼館の衣装は色気がありながらも清楚で、俺も好きだよ。:
Ah, you're right. The brothel outfits are sexy yet modest; I like them
too.
それに、ここで働いてる姫騎士さんもいるみたいだし。<br>ってことは一緒に働けば:
Plus, I heard a Princess Knight works here. So if we work together, I
might be able to connect with her!
普通なら推しと繋がるなんてあるまじき行為ですけど、<br>職場が同じってことであ:
Normally, getting involved with my favorite is sacrilege, but if we're
just coworkers, it should be barely legal!
途中からよく分からなくなったが……まあクロエらしくていいか。<br>なら応募すれ:
I got lost halfway through, but... well, that's so Chloe, it's fine. So
why not just apply? What's the problem?
私、スタイルに自信がないので、あんな衣装を着ていいのかなって……。 <br>ソフ:
I don't have confidence in my figure, so I'm wondering if I can wear
an outfit like that... I don't have a toned body like Sophia...
ふむ……なら、試しに着てみるか？ <br>俺からルディアに頼んでみるよ。: Hmm... then want to try one on? I'll ask Ludia for you.
ど、どうでしょう……？<br>やっぱり姫騎士さんみたいに綺麗ってわけにはいかない:
W-well, what do you think? I know I can't look as gorgeous as a
Princess Knight, but...
いやいや、十分過ぎるほどに魅力的だぞ。 <br>どこがスタイルに自信がない、だよ:
No, no, you're more than attractive enough. What do you mean you're
not confident in your figure? You look amazing.
そ、それは司令官くんが、その……私を推してるから、そう思うだけで……。 <br>:
Th-that's just because I'm your favorite, Commander... But being
praised like that somehow gives me confidence...
は！？ そんなに簡単に決めていいのかよ……: What! You can decide that easily...?
いやぁ～、なんだかこの衣装を着ているだけで、気分が昂ってきますしね～。<br>こ:
Well, I-I don't know, just wearing this outfit somehow gets me so
worked up, you know? I think it'll be fine!
単純だな……。<br>まあいい、それなら早速研修といくか。: You're so simple... Well, fine. Then let's start the training right away.
